info.name: Student Activity Portal
info.description: API collection for Student Activity Portal backend. Base URL: http://localhost:3000

request.description: Login. Token + userId auto-saved.
Login as admin. Token + userId auto-saved.
Admin: list all users with search/filter/pagination.
Get registrations/activities for current user.
Get organizations that current user is a member of.
Admin: change user status (active/inactive/banned/suspended).
Admin: soft-delete a user.
List organizations with search/filter/pagination.
Create org. Creator is auto-added as president. Types: university, club, department, company.
Roles: president, vice_president, head_of_department, vice_head, member.
List activities with search, filter by category/org/status/type, pagination, sorting.

body.raw:
{
  "activityName": "Giai Bong Da SV 2026",
  "description": "Giai bong da sinh vien thuong nien",
  "location": "San van dong A",
  "activityType": "competition",
  "teamMode": "team",
  "startTime": "2026-04-01T08:00:00Z",
  "endTime": "2026-04-03T17:00:00Z",
  "registrationDeadline": "2026-03-28T23:59:00Z",
  "minParticipants": 4,
  "maxParticipants": 32,
  "prize": "Cup vang + 5 trieu VND",
  "organizationId": {{organizationId}},
  "categoryId": {{categoryId}},
  "teamRule": {
    "minTeamMembers": 5,
    "maxTeamMembers": 11
  }
}

request.description: Types: program, competition, recruitment. teamMode: individual, team, both. Status starts as draft.

body.raw:
{
  "activityName": "Tuyen Thanh Vien CLB Lap Trinh 2026",
  "description": "Dot tuyen thanh vien moi cho CLB Lap Trinh",
  "activityType": "recruitment",
  "teamMode": "individual",
  "startTime": "2026-04-05T08:00:00Z",
  "endTime": "2026-04-20T23:59:00Z",
  "registrationDeadline": "2026-04-15T23:59:00Z",
  "organizationId": {{organizationId}},
  "categoryId": {{categoryId}}
}

request.description: Create a recruitment activity for club member recruitment. Use this activityId for Club Applications.
Only editable when status is draft or published.
State machine: draft->published->running->finished. Any state->cancelled.
Create a checkin time window for an activity.
Register for an activity. Activity must be published/running and before deadline.
Group registration. Creator auto-added as leader. teamMembers optional.
Cancel own registration. Only pending or approved can be cancelled.
Admin/Leader: list all registrations for an activity.
Stats: total, pending, approved, rejected, cancelled, checkedIn, maxParticipants.
Status: approved or rejected.
Batch approve/reject multiple registrations at once.
Check in to a checkin session. Registration must be approved.
Check out from a checkin session.
Apply for a club via a recruitment activity.
Admin/Leader: list applications for a recruitment activity.
Schedule interview for an applicant.
Accept applicant. Auto-adds them as organization member.
Withdraw own application. Only works if still pending.
Send notification. channels: IN_APP, EMAIL, SMS.
Target: sendToAll, organizationId, or userIds array.
